'''Tormak Rodan''' was the older brother of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Fyor Rodan]]. Rodan was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] until [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|Jabba's death]] and later operated out of his native [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] working for himself; many believed that his brother was also involved in the trade. In truth, the two hated each other.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1stm}}
